title: Shelf Life Config
description: Shelf-life/HSD Config v1 contract. PACK-02 references 12 months HSD via shelf-life config; exact policy must be configured, not hardcoded.
$comment: Sources: PACK-02 HSD Config requirement. TODO: source documents do not define all shelf-life policy variants.

shelf_life_months.description: Shelf life in months. PACK-02 mentions 12 months through config.

start_event.description: Event/date basis for shelf-life start. TODO: confirm if start is production, release, or warehouse receipt.
